title: geum rotundifolium
intro: Geum rotundifolium, also known as the round-leaved avens, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geum rotundifolium include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and inflammation of the digestive tract, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Geum rotundifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
